title: Functions should not contain too many return statements
description: A function should not contain too many return statements as it makes the code harder to read and maintain.
message: Function contains more than X return statements.
recommendation: Consider simplifying the function or breaking it down into smaller functions.

noncompliant.description: Function with more than one return statement

compliant.description: Function with a single return statement

why_is_this_an_issue: Excessive return statements can make the function harder to read and maintain.
how_to_fix: Consider simplifying the function or breaking it down into smaller functions.

metadata.title: Functions should not contain too many return statements
